name: Mina Ashiro
description: Mina is a very talented member of the Defense Force and an extremely talented marksman. She is the captain of the Defense Force's Third Division. When she was a child, she and [Kafka](https://anilist.co/character/180692/Kafka-Hibino) met each other after a Kaiju attack, swearing that they will both join the Defense Force and fight Kaiju alongside each other.

name: Ayato Kirishima
description: __Height:__ 159 cm (5'2") Ayato Kirishima is [Touka Kirishima](https://anilist.co/character/87277/Touka-Kirishima)'s younger brother. He grew up with his sister in the 20th ward but at some point of time, he disappeared. Currently, he is an executive of Aogiri Tree. An arrogant youth with a similar harsh attitude that resembles his sister. name: Minene Uryuu
description: __Occupation__: International Wanted Terrorist __Height__: 168 cm Minene Uryuu is a terrorist bomber. Like the Fourth, her "Escape" diary goes along with the type of profession she is involved in. Whenever Minene faces a dire situation, the diary will chart out the best course of actions she can take in order to get out of a tight spot. name: Mordred Pendragon
description: Mordred is the "son" of King Arthur though, in reality, she is a woman. Morgan le Fay, Artoria's sister, created Mordred as a homunculus clone of the King. Morgan grew Mordred in secret, inculcating her the desire to usurp the King and ascend to the throne as the rightful heir. To achieve this objective Mordred was made to be one of the Knights of the Round Table. With time Mordred grew to idolize her "father", but the King refused to recognize her as a rightful heir. description: __Zodiac Animal:__ Dog Shigure transforms into the dog of the Chinese Zodiac whenever he is hugged by the opposite gender or his body comes under a great deal of stress. Shigure is one of the oldest members of the Soma family. He is laid-back and anything but solemn. He is somewhat of a pervert, and as a writer of both romance novels and academic books. name: Jeanne  d'Arc
description: __Height:__ 159 cm (5'3) Ruler's True Name is Jeanne d'Arc, the Saint of Orleans. A Catholic saint born in Domrémy, France, and the heroine of France who liberated Orléans in the Hundred Years' War. A Ruler Class Servant is the Standard-Bearer who Correctly Guides the Holy Grail War. Jeanne is a special Heroic Spirit summoned by the Holy Grail itself to act as the administrator of the Holy Grail War instead of the Church. name: Yuuko Ichihara
description: Being one extremely experienced in her industry, Yuuko is not foolish enough to give away her real name like [Watanuki](https://anilist.co/character/235). That aside, Yuuko has served as a major catalyst for Watanuki's transformation, acting somewhat as his mentor. She loves to drink and eat Watanuki's wonderful cooking and dragging Watanuki on crazy outings at the drop of a hat. Despite this immature and free-spirited attitude, Yuuko has been known to be sage-like and serious when the time call

name: Satoru
description: __Race:__ Human __Location:__ Z-City __Weapons:__ Gauntlets __Occupation:__ Superhero __Level:__ C-Class; Rank: 1 __Affiliation:__ Heroes Association License-less Rider is a C-Class Hero from Z-City. He has the #1 rank of the C-Class.

name: Asirpa
description: Asirpa is an Ainu girl who finds Sugimoto when he is attacked by a bear. Her father was one of the Ainu killed by the Japanese who stole the Ainu gold. Her Japanese name is Asuko Kochoube (小蝶辺明日子). From a young age, Asirpa was trained by her father to become a hunter. As such, she possesses many skills that are necessary for a successful hunter: trapping, poison brewing, knowledge of traditional medicine, archery, deep knowledge of Hokkaido's flora and fauna, harsh winter survival. Asirpa is als

name: Kai Chisaki
description: __Height:__ 179 cm (5'10") __Quirk:__ Overhaul Kai Chisaki, also known by the villain name Overhaul, is the Yakuza Captain of the Shie Hassaikai. Overhaul is a mysophobic, antisocial sociopath obsessed with returning the world to the way it was before the Quirk phenomenon. Due to a combination of an old theory claiming Quirks derived from rats and his own mysophobia, Overhaul believes that Quirks are actually a plague on humanity, having infected people with "syndromes" of heroism and villainy.

name: Saki Hanajima
description: Saki is a psychic girl with a goth-like appearance who has the ability to sense people's "auras" and send out electric waves (denpa in Japanese). Much like Arisa, Saki is extremely protective of Tohru, who was the first person in school who had truly accepted her. She is very observant, polite, and loves to eat (and is rarely seen not eating outside of school). Her nickname (Hana-chan) and her manga symbol, a violet with fangs, relate humorously in that hana means "flower" in Japanese. Hanajima

name: Kaoru Hitachiin
description: __Height:__ 175 cm (5'9") Kaoru Hitachiin is a devious and childish first-year student who greatly enjoys toying with his fellow Host Club members, Haruhi and Tamaki (whom he often calls “My Lord”). He and his older identical twin, Hikaru, are “little devil” type hosts who put on an act of “forbidden brotherly love” (with Kaoru as the uke) to draw in their clients. name: Anisphia Wynn Palettia
nativeName: アニスフィア・ウィン・パレッティア
description: Anisphia is the first Princess of the Kingdom of Palettia. Possessing memories of her past life, she longs to be able to fly in the sky with the power of magic. However, as she's unable to use magic herself, she spends her days conducting questionable research in hopes of fulfilling her dream. Her eccentric behavior earned her the nickname "Princess Peculiar".

description: Johan's twin sister and the only unharmed survivor of the night when both her parents and her brother were shot in what appeared to be a botched burglary. At first she showed signs of amnesia due to the psychological trauma of the incident. After she and her brother disappeared, she was adopted by the Fortner family from Heidelberg, who were unaware of her previous identity as Anna Liebert. description: His codename is Hei, which means black in Chinese. Hei is a very talented contractor, his Messier Code is BK-201. Hei lives two lives in the series. He lives in the Umitsuki apartments and is always working a new part-time job.He has a huge appetite, not unlike most anime characters. name: Rudo
